background: Homeworld: Caprice/Kukulcan (A7978B-C). Grew up on orbital stations as salvage tech. 'Sparks' nickname from electrical engineering expertise and shocking solutions. Intuitive understanding of technology - can repair almost anything with improvised parts. 2 years on Solomani-Vegan cargo freighters.
terms: Drifter (Scavenger): Astrogation-0, Mechanic-1, Pilot-0, Vacc Suit-1, Zero-G-1. Salvage tech and tinkerer on Caprice orbital stations. Advanced to rank 1.
Drifter (Scavenger): Mechanic-2, Vacc Suit-2, Zero-G-2, Streetwise-1. Discovered Imperial spy transmitter in salvaged ship component. Turned it over to authorities.
Merchant (Free Trader): Mechanic-3, Engineer (power)-1, Electronics (comms)-1. Worked on Solomani-Vegan cargo freighters. Learned Vegan engineering philosophy and language. Advanced to rank 1.
Merchant (Free Trader): Engineer (power)-2, Electronics (computers)-1, Pilot (small craft)-1. Respected Vegan engineering: elegant, efficient, minimal waste. Made Vegan friends.
Merchant (Free Trader): Electronics (comms)-2, Electronics (computers)-2, Streetwise-2. Two years in merchant community. Mustering out: gained Vegan merchant contacts.

Agent (Intelligence): Stealth-1, Gun Combat (slug)-1, Language (vegan)-1. Recruited by SolSec after discovering spy equipment. Technical operations specialist. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Advanced to rank 1. Mustering out: Laser Pistol, Vacc Suit, Engineer's Toolkit, 5000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Mechanical repair, power systems engineering, electronics (comms and computers), improvisation, salvage operations, zero-gravity work, Vegan engineering techniques, small craft piloting
Weaknesses: Apolitical (doesn't care about Solomani Cause), trusts Vegan friends (potential security risk), pragmatic to a fault, limited formal education
